settings.title: Monster Piercing | Plugs & Tunnels
settings.text:
Body modification enthusiasts looking to stretch their piercings will find a wide array of plugs, tunnels, and expanders at Monster Piercing. Stretching your ears or other body parts is a gradual process that requires specialised tools and jewellery to ensure a safe and comfortable experience. Our collection includes high-quality plugs, tunnels, and expanders made from materials such as surgical steel, silicone, acrylic, wood, and glass. These materials not only offer durability but are also hypoallergenic, ensuring safe wear for sensitive skin. 

Plugs and tunnels are available in a range of sizes, from small to large gauges, and come in various styles, including plain, jewelled, or UV-reactive options. Expanders, often referred to as tapers, are ideal for gradually stretching piercings without causing discomfort. With a variety of shapes and colors to choose from, our collection caters to both beginner and experienced stretchers. We also provide aftercare products to help maintain the health and hygiene of stretched piercings.

One of the main features of a BCR is its secure closure, where the ball is held in place by the tension of the ring, ensuring that it doesn’t easily fall out. Available in various sizes and gauges, BCR rings are easy to remove and replace, offering convenience for those who like to change their jewelry frequently. Their simple design also allows for a clean, minimalistic look, but with the option to choose decorative balls to add a touch of personal style. BCRs are versatile, making them ideal for both casual and formal wear, allowing for flexibility in how you express your individuality.

settings.question: What types of jewellery are included in your stretched ear collection?
settings.answer:
Our collection includes plugs, tunnels, expanders, and tapers —
everything you need for stretched or gauged ear piercings. Each piece is crafted for comfort, safety, and style, available in a variety of sizes and materials to suit every stage of your stretching journey.

settings.question: What materials are your plugs and tunnels made from?
settings.answer:
We offer stretched ear jewellery in a range of premium materials, including:

  • 316L surgical steel – strong, durable, and ideal for everyday wear.
  • UV acrylic – lightweight and available in vibrant colours and designs.
  • Natural wood – breathable, organic, and comfortable for healed stretches.
  • Stone – smooth, heavy, and perfect for maintaining stretched lobes.
  • Pyrex glass – non-porous, hypoallergenic, and suitable for sensitive skin.

Each material is carefully finished to ensure smooth edges and a safe fit.

settings.question: What’s the difference between plugs, tunnels, expanders, and tapers?
settings.answer:
• Plugs are solid pieces that fill the stretched lobe completely.
  • Tunnels (or eyelets) are hollow plugs that show through the piercing.
  • Tapers are cone-shaped pieces used to gradually stretch the ear to the next size.
  • Expanders are similar to tapers and help safely increase gauge size over time.

Each type serves a different purpose — from stretching to long-term wear.

settings.question: How do I stretch my ears safely?
settings.answer: Always stretch slowly, one size at a time, and allow full healing before moving to the next gauge. Clean both your jewellery and ears regularly with saline or mild soap, and avoid skipping sizes to prevent tearing or blowouts. Our tapers and expandersare designed to help you stretch gradually and safely.
